headlines.headline: Varvov Retail Group confirms participation in Capital Markets Day

sentiment.reasoning: Participation in a Capital Markets Day is a standard corporate event that typically provides no immediate material financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
